description:
The image captures a serene night scene in a room bathed in darkness. The room's walls, painted in a soothing shade of beige, provide a warm backdrop to the scene. Two windows punctuate these walls, their presence announced by white curtains that hang gracefully from them.

The floor beneath is carpeted in a dark hue, adding an element of coziness to the space. A black table stands out against this backdrop, its surface adorned with two objects - a blue bottle and a white tissue box. The table's location in the room suggests it might be near one of the windows or closer to the wall.

The atmosphere is further enhanced by the soft glow emanating from the windows, their light filtering through the curtains and casting an ethereal glow on the floor below. This interplay of light and shadow adds depth to the scene, creating a sense of tranquility that pervades the room.
